summary: Iteration 4 verification complete. Backend pytest 8/8 passing. Frontend Playwright: ALL 17 assertions PASS — single-char input bug FIXED (contact/quote/career names accept full strings), validations work as spec (name>=3, phone 10 digits numeric-only, email RFC, message>=10), WhatsApp opens to wa.me/917066004545 on every successful submit (contact + quote + career), Home slider present above Who-We-Are with prev/next/dot-0/1/2 testids and auto-advance ~4s confirmed, mobile (390x844) About qualification badges render BELOW image (desktop variant hidden via md:hidden, display:none), Careers shows opening-sales-executive + opening-jr-accountant cards and apply-btn pre-fills career-position, Products /water-management Hume Pipes upload-product-image visible, footer Reach Us phone is whitespace:nowrap on single line, no console/page errors across Home/About/Products/Category/Careers/Contact, slider assets (service_supply.png, service_install.png, service_consult.png) all 200 OK.

verified_assertions.single_char_bug_fix: contact-name='Anand Joshi' typed char-by-char retained full string; same for quote-name='Quote Tester Full' and career-name='Career Tester'.
verified_assertions.phone_strip_max10: Typing 'abc98765432109xyz' into contact-phone -> '9876543210'; quote-phone same; max 10 enforced.
verified_assertions.validations: empty submit shows error-name/error-phone/error-email/error-message; name='AB' -> 'Name must be at least 3 characters.'; phone='123' -> 'Phone must be exactly 10 digits.'; email 'foo@bar' triggers error-email, 'foo@bar.com' clears it.
verified_assertions.contact_flow: POST /api/contact 200, contact-success visible, window.open captured https://wa.me/917066004545?text=*Customer%20Enquiry*... containing Name/Phone/Email/Message/Time/Source.
verified_assertions.quote_flow: tab-quote click reveals quote-form; submit -> /api/quote 200 + quote-success + wa.me/917066004545 opened.
verified_assertions.career_flow: apply-btn-sales-executive prefills career-position='Sales Executive' and scrolls to apply-form; submit -> /api/career 200 + career-success + wa.me/917066004545 opened.
verified_assertions.home_slider: data-testid home-slider present above Who-We-Are; slider-prev/next/dot-0/1/2 all render and clickable; auto-advance: active dot moved from 0 -> 1 after ~4s (with cursor moved off slider to disable pause-on-hover).
verified_assertions.team_badges_mobile: On 390x844 About page, team-qualification-mobile-rahul-sawant and team-qualification-mobile-chetan-sharma render BELOW the image (md:hidden block visible on mobile).
verified_assertions.team_badges_desktop: On 1920 About page, team-qualification-mobile-* getComputedStyle.display='none' (overlay variant retained on the photo).
verified_assertions.careers_openings: opening-sales-executive (Pune Travelling) and opening-jr-accountant (Pune) cards visible with requirements lists; apply-btn-{id} both functional.
verified_assertions.footer: footer-reach-us has phone <a href='tel:+917066004545'> with computed white-space:nowrap, single-line text '+91 70660 04545'.
verified_assertions.backend_apis: 8/8 pytest passing (health, root, contact create+list+invalid-email, quote create+list, brochure-product quote, career create + minimal).

critical_code_review_comments: ProductImage upload still persists base64 dataURLs in localStorage (key rcp_product_images_v2). With up to 8 images per product across many products, the ~5MB localStorage quota will be hit quickly — should compress, downscale, or move persistence to backend before production.

ContactForm/QuoteForm/Careers: on submit failure, openWhatsApp still fires AND the user sees toast.error, but the form is NOT reset — user could click submit again and trigger duplicate WhatsApp + duplicate retry POST. Consider disabling submit briefly or de-duplicating.

Carry-over from prior iterations: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event, CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True (browsers reject this combo), no rate-limiting on public POST endpoints, missing pagination on list endpoints.
Document <title> still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' (carry-over from iteration 1) — not branded.
Home.jsx product tiles still reference PRODUCTS[i].img which is undefined in site.js — broken/empty on homepage product grid (carry-over).
seed_data_creation: Added a few TEST_ prefixed contact/quote/career rows via successful submit flows + pytest fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://infra-build-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (8/8). QuoteForm lives inside /contact gated by data-testid='tab-quote'. WhatsApp window.open can be intercepted via page.add_init_script overriding window.open. All form fields use TextField/TextAreaField/SelectField from /app/frontend/src/components/FormFields.jsx (stable, defined OUTSIDE parent — focus retention verified).
rca of the issue: N/A — all iteration-4 requirements verified end-to-end.
